name: python3-pyqt6.qtremoteobjects
title: python3-pyqt6.qtremoteobjects
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 Remote Objects module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 Remote Objects module
Qt Remote Objects API is an Inter-Process Communication (IPC) module developed
for Qt.
.
This package contains the QtRemoteObjects module of PyQt6.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6.qtremoteobjects because Python bindings for Qt 6 Remote Objects module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6.qtremoteobjects as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtremoteobjects with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtremoteobjects --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
